settings.heading: A compare destination ready for structured product groups
settings.copy: Use this page for broader compare sets that sit outside the PDP but still use the same group-driven system.
settings.support_note: The compare page should help customers narrow decisions, not repeat product cards without context.

settings.heading: Compare adjacent products and support context
settings.copy: This page can later be driven entirely from comparison groups while keeping the current fallback structure.

settings.heading: Compare pages should still route into support and buying guidance
settings.copy: Use the final CTA to move from compare into product support or direct contact when needed.
